description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Report Builder: the OU column now shows the full OU path (e.g. OU=IT,OU=ADPRO Users), matching the built-in reports.
- Scheduled reports: exported files are now named after the scheduled task consistently, instead of the report name for standard reports.
- Modify Group: new read-only Member Of tab showing the groups a group belongs to.
- Create User: added the Division attribute to the Properties tab (saved with templates).
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Modify Group: changing the Group Name (CN) now saves (performs a directory rename).
- Report Builder: Distinguished Name conditions (Contains, Starts With, etc.) now return results instead of nothing.
